case_title: 1144 HOWARD STREET ASSOCIATES vs. FRONCZEK, VINCENT et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRONCZEK, VINCENT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1144 HOWARD ST, 1ST & 2ND FLOOR, REAR UNITS, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAYS; SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
RECORD ON APPEAL PREPARED
RENT DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $436.92 DEPOSITED BY VINCENT FRONCZEK TRANSFERRED TO THE AOC TRUST ACCOUNT. OLD TAG NO. 102241. NEW TAG NO. 31048. INTEREST INCLUDED IN THE NEW DEPOSIT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FRONCZEK, VINCENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1144 HOWARD STREET ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRONCZEK, VINCENT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1144 HOWARD ST, FIRST AND SECOND FLOOR REAR UNITS, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
